ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the race event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the race took place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the event */,
  "event_gender" TEXT /* Gender category of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the athletic team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_school" TEXT /* Name of the school the team represents */,
  "team_division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "team_conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "event_specialty" TEXT /* Event specialty of the athlete */,
  "athlete_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "athlete_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "athlete_height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "athlete_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relay_teams" (
  "relay_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relay team */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the team is participating in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the relay team belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the relay team to complete the race */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the relay team */,
  "relay_team_name" TEXT /* Name of the relay team */,
  "relay_team_captain" TEXT /* Captain of the relay team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relay_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relay_teams_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relay_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relay_team_members" (
  "relay_team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member in a relay team */,
  "relay_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relay team the athlete is part of */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who is part of the relay team */,
  "relay_member_position" TEXT /* Position of the athlete in the relay team */,
  "relay_member_split_time" TEXT /* Split time for each athlete in the relay team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relay_team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relay_team_members_relay_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("relay_team_id") REFERENCES relay_teams ("relay_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relay_team_members_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that achieved the score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the team in the race */,
  "score_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the event */,
  "score_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_scores_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the athlete participated in */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who participated in the race */,
  "performance_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the athlete to complete the race */,
  "performance_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the athlete in the race */,
  "performance_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "performance_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_performance_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
